# Crimson Warrior Free Pack

- Source: https://igormoroniy.itch.io/crimson-warrior-free-top-down-pixel-art-character-pack
- Creator: Igormoroniy
- Downloaded: 2026-07-22
- Source license statement: free for commercial use; credit is appreciated but not required.
- Imported subset: down-facing and right-facing idle, run, and sword attack PNG sprite sheets.
- Active player bindings: right-facing sheets; horizontal movement flips them when the player moves left.

Do not redistribute these source files as a standalone asset pack.
